hero.lead: Instead of blindly producing content, NeverSEO researches your market and customers before planning, then manages all four disciplines: content, technical, off-page and measurement. The result is a site that builds standing on search engines and gets cited by AI platforms.

logos.eyebrow: Trusted by over 50+ businesses & projects in Vietnam

problems.label: Current Challenges
problems.title: Buyers changed how they search. Content production didn't.
problems.desc: Google keeps raising the bar for genuine value, while a growing share of research now happens inside AI platforms. Keyword stuffing and mass production underperform on Google and do nothing to get you into an AI's answer.

items.title: Writing without knowing who you write for
items.desc: No customer portrait, no grasp of what worries them or what they're second-guessing. The article matches the keyword but misses the real problem, so nobody gets in touch after reading it.

items.title: Over-relying on AI
items.desc: Thousands of unchecked AI articles: unsourced figures, wrong facts, no voice. Google files it under mass-produced content, and customers stop trusting you.

items.title: Hard to measure ROI
items.desc: Pouring money into content and backlinks without knowing exactly which activities are actually driving traffic and potential customers.

items.title: People ask AI instead of searching
items.desc: More and more buyers describe what they need to ChatGPT or Gemini before deciding, or simply read the AI summary at the top of the results page. If your brand isn't named in that answer, you lose the customer before they ever reach your website.

solution.label: NeverSEO Solution
solution.title: Run a controlled SEO & GEO process on a single platform.
solution.desc: NeverSEO combines real-world data (Crawl, GSC, SERPs) with the powerful analytical capabilities of specialized AI models. From technical foundations and content strategy to performance measurement—everything is managed in a standardized workflow with no blind spots, eliminating the need to stitch together multiple tools.

research.label: Strategic foundation
research.title_start: Understand the market and the customer
research.desc: Google judges content on four things — real experience, expertise, authoritativeness and trustworthiness (E-E-A-T) — and favours writing made for readers rather than for the search engine. You cannot meet that bar without first knowing what your customers need. So NeverSEO starts from the market, the customer, and whatever competitors have left unanswered.

items.title: Market & niche analysis
items.desc: How demand is shifting, what affects your project directly, and where the openings nobody has taken yet actually are.

items.title: Customer portraits & hidden intent
items.desc: It doesn't stop at age and job title. The system unpacks five layers behind every search: the unspoken worry, the outcome they actually want, the doubt still holding them back, the limits on budget and time, and the question they'll ask next.

items.title: SWOT grounded in evidence
items.desc: Your own strengths and weaknesses assessed from data gathered on your site, from Search Console and from public signals — not from gut feel.

items.title: Real competitors on the results page
items.desc: Competitors are picked from the actual results for your priority needs — sometimes an industry publication or a marketplace rather than a business rival — then analysed for strengths, weaknesses and whatever they've left uncovered.

items.title: Content gaps & openings
items.desc: Exactly which needs nobody has answered properly yet, and where you can take the space before a competitor notices.

items.title: Topic map & follow-up questions
items.desc: A complete topic map, plus a simulation of the 5–10 follow-up questions AI tends to raise around each subject. Any question without an article answering it is a gap worth filling.

notes.title: Measured or estimated — always labelled
notes.desc: Every analysis is tagged as either measured data or a structured estimate. The system does not invent search volumes, rankings or competitor weaknesses to make a report look better.

notes.title: Strategy bends to you, not to a template
notes.desc: The roadmap changes with your site's maturity and business model — local service, e-commerce, B2B, publisher or app. A new site is never pushed at terms a competitor has held for years.

ops.label: Operations & collaboration
ops.title_gradient: and your whole team in one place.
ops.desc: The hard part of SEO isn't only the expertise — it's keeping several people and several projects pointed the same way. This is the operational layer NeverSEO handles for you.

items.title: Many projects, one organisation
items.desc: Group your sites, give each project its own strategy, plan and quota, and still see the whole picture at a glance.

items.title: Role-based permissions
items.desc: Owners, admins and members get different rights. Invite a collaborator into one project without handing over an account.

items.title: Assign work, track progress
items.desc: Every article has an owner and a clear status, from the moment it's a brief to the moment it's live.

items.title: Publish straight to your site
items.desc: Connect WordPress to publish articles with their images, categories and structured data — no copying back and forth.

items.title: Runs on a schedule
items.desc: Heavy jobs run in the background on a queue and a set schedule. The system tells you when they finish, or when something needs you.

items.title: Export reports for clients
items.desc: Send plans and results out to Word, Excel or Google Docs for clients and leadership.

geo.label: AI Search Visibility
geo.desc: Traditional SEO is not enough. As buyers shift to searching with ChatGPT, Gemini or Perplexity, NeverSEO helps you measure and optimize so your brand always appears in the answers.

items.title: Measure AI Mention Rate
items.desc: Automatically simulate mass real-world queries on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini... to count the frequency and position of your brand mentioned by AI.

items.title: Track AI Overviews (SGE)
items.desc: Record your position in the AI-generated answer block right on Google results page — where a massive amount of organic traffic is decided before users scroll.

items.title: Optimize content for AI (GEO)
items.desc: Structure content so AI can easily extract it: direct answers, attributed facts, and standalone information blocks.

items.title: Synchronize Entity signals
items.desc: Declare your business using structured data and link consistently across all channels so AI understands exactly who you are, instead of just reading text.

items.title: Technical SEO for AI Bots
items.desc: Ensure HTML structure does not hinder crawling and robots.txt is correctly opened for GPTBot, ClaudeBot or PerplexityBot.

items.title: Manage SEO costs and effectiveness
items.desc: See where SEO stands without needing the jargon. Track what your investment is returning and which articles actually convert.

items.title: Save time, optimize workflows
items.desc: Cut hours of manual keyword research. Run several projects side by side in one organisation, set permissions per member and follow progress without a separate spreadsheet.

items.title: Solve the blank page problem
items.desc: Always have topics and detailed outlines ready to write. AI tools help draft faster, ensure SEO standards, and maintain consistent quality.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: A lean four-step workflow
workflow.desc: From diagnosing where you stand, through market research, to production and measurement. What you learn in the last step feeds the next cycle, so the campaign tracks reality more closely the longer it runs.

steps.title: 1. Analyse the current site
steps.desc: The system scans your site to surface what needs fixing, assess its maturity and brand profile, and find articles quietly competing with each other.

panel.title: Foundation diagnosis
panel.caption: Scan results for a language school's website.

steps.title: 2. Research the market & customer
steps.desc: Market and niche analysis, customer portraits with the hidden intent behind each question, an evidenced SWOT, and a breakdown of who really holds the results page.

panel.title: Customer portrait
panel.persona: Parent of a child aged 8–12 · urban area

rows.label: The unspoken worry
rows.value: Three years of classes and the child still won't speak English aloud

rows.label: Outcome actually wanted
rows.value: A child who speaks confidently and uses English outside the classroom

rows.label: The lingering doubt
rows.value: Whether a teacher can really support each child in a class that size

rows.label: Limits in play
rows.value: Under $120 a month, and close enough to get to after school

rows.label: The next question
rows.value: Is there a trial lesson before paying the full fee?

panel.caption: One target audience for the school, including what they never say out loud.

steps.title: 3. Topic map & content plan
steps.desc: Rather than chasing scattered keywords, the system builds a topic map as the backbone, scores priorities by business value, then turns it into briefs a writer can pick up immediately.

panel.title: Topic map & monthly plan

rows.title: What language schools charge, and how to pick the right path
What age should a child start English? A stage-by-stage look
7 signs a child is falling behind in English that parents miss

panel.caption: The topics that need covering, and the articles planned for the first month.

steps.title: 4. Review, measure, repeat
steps.desc: Drafts are scored before they go live and only publish once they meet the bar. After that the system tracks rankings, traffic, new backlinks and AI mentions — then folds all of it into next month's plan.

panel.title: Review & measurement

rows.label: New value vs what already ranks

panel.ai_label: How often AI names the brand
panel.caption: One article's quality score before publishing, and how often AI names the brand.

trust.title: Nothing gets published until it meets the bar.

items.title: A detailed brief comes first
items.desc: Objective, outline, keywords, audience and the knowledge required are settled up front, so the article doesn't drift off course.

items.title: Figures must carry a source
items.desc: Every material number and quote comes with its source and date. When no credible source exists, it's dropped rather than guessed at.

items.title: Scored independently before it ships
items.desc: Drafts below the threshold are blocked with the specific fixes listed, which keeps quality even across a team of writers.

items.title: The decision stays yours
items.desc: The system recommends and warns; the strategy and the publish button stay with your team.

workflow.loop_note: Data from step 4 feeds back into steps 2 and 3 for the next cycle

items.q: Does NeverSEO replace my SEO staff?
items.a: No. NeverSEO helps your team work faster with fewer mistakes by automating the analysis and operational work. Decisions that need real business context stay with people.

items.q: I'm new to SEO — can I still use it?
items.a: Yes. The system spells out each step and explains the reasoning behind every recommendation, so you can act immediately while gradually learning how SEO works.

items.q: Is SEO still worth the investment now that people ask AI?
items.a: How people search changed; what they need didn't. AI platforms still draw on web content and still cite sources. The work is to write so AI can quote you, and to track whether your brand actually gets mentioned.

items.q: How is GEO different from SEO?
items.a: SEO aims to rank your site and earn the visit. GEO aims to have your content chosen as a source when AI assembles an answer, even if nobody visits the site at all. Both rest on genuinely good content; they differ in how it's presented so machines can read and quote it.

items.q: How do I know whether AI mentions my brand?
items.a: NeverSEO asks each AI platform the questions customers commonly ask in your category, then records whether your brand is named and where it appears. Results are stored over time so you see the trend rather than a single lucky sample.

items.q: Will AI-generated content get penalised by Google?
items.a: Google doesn't penalise content for the tool that made it; it demotes thin content that adds nothing new. That's why every NeverSEO article follows a brief with a stated objective, must cite sources for material figures, and has to pass a scoring round before it can be published.

items.q: Is my company's data kept private?
items.a: Yes. Each organisation gets a fully separate data space. Sensitive information is encrypted and never shared with third parties.

items.q: Can I use my own AI account?
items.a: Yes. On the Enterprise plan you can connect your own API key to manage costs directly and stay in control at larger scale.

Any guarantee of top rankings is unrealistic — algorithms shift constantly, and results also depend on your domain's age, brand strength and how competitive your industry is. What NeverSEO commits to is a rigorous process and content good enough to grow on.

items.q: Can I cancel or change plans at any time?
items.a: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade or cancel from your account settings at any time, with no long-term contract.

privacy.meta_desc: Privacy and data protection policy for the NeverSEO system, including compliance with Google API Services user data policy.
privacy.label: Legal / NeverSEO
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to NeverSEO. We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our web application.
privacy.p1: When you create an account or use NeverSEO, we may collect:
privacy.l1_1: Identification information: Name, email address, avatar (when logging in via Google OAuth).
privacy.l1_2: Usage data: Activity logs, AI Token usage.
privacy.l1_3: Data provided by you: SEO campaigns, keyword lists, content drafts, third-party AI service API keys (securely encrypted using AES-256 in our database).
privacy.h2: 2. Compliance with Google API Data Policy
privacy.p2_1: NeverSEO's use and transfer to any other app of information received from Google APIs will adhere to Google API Services User Data Policy, including the Limited Use requirements.
privacy.p2_2: Specifically, when you grant access to Google Search Console or Google Analytics for Audit and measurement features:
privacy.l2_1: We only use this data to provide or improve features for users (ranking analysis, traffic).
privacy.l2_2: We do not share or sell user data to third parties for advertising or any other unrelated purposes.
privacy.l2_3: We do not allow humans to read this data unless we have your explicit consent for technical support or for security/legal compliance purposes.
privacy.p3: The system supports multiple accounts, and each working group (Organization) has an independent data space. Sensitive data (such as API Keys, Access Tokens) is securely stored using the most advanced encryption algorithm (AES-256).
privacy.p4: You have the right to access, update, or request the deletion of all your personal data from the system. Deleting an account (Organization) will permanently delete all associated project data, configurations, and content.
privacy.p5: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via email at support@neverseo.com.

terms.meta_desc: Terms and conditions for using the NeverSEO system.
terms.label: Legal / NeverSEO
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing or using the NeverSEO application, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.p1: NeverSEO is an end-to-end SEO management and AI writing system that provides tools to analyze, plan keywords (Topical Map), and generate optimized content. We provide interfaces to interact with third-party Large Language Models (LLMs) (such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) via your own API Keys or through our subscription plans.
terms.l2_1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account (Organization).
terms.l2_2: You agree to provide accurate information when setting up your account and integration configurations.
terms.l2_3: In the event you input your own API Key (BYOK - Bring Your Own Key), you are solely responsible for any usage costs incurred on that AI provider's platform.
terms.p3: You retain full ownership of the content (articles, images) generated through the system using your account. However, the software architecture, interface, and processing workflows (Gating, Prompt chaining) are copyrighted by SaoLabs.
terms.l4_1: Use the system to create content that violates laws, opposes the State, or infringes on third-party copyrights.
terms.l4_2: Attack, interfere with, or compromise the security of the NeverSEO system.
terms.l4_3: Automate extraction (spam, scraping) using unauthorized bots against the web interface.
terms.p5: NeverSEO does not guarantee ranking results on Google or other search engines, as rankings depend on many practical factors (domain authority, backlinks, algorithm changes). AI-generated content is for reference only, and you are responsible for quality control (QC) before publishing.
terms.p6: We reserve the right to update the Terms of Service at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon being posted on this page. Your continued use of the application signifies your acceptance of the new terms.
